content.en:
"This level doesn't seem to be difficult!"

Ye Tian comprehended these two balls, and after a while, he found that it seemed that it was not difficult to fuse these two balls.

At first, he did find it difficult.

However, after he comprehended the time ball and the space ball, he completely understood the power changes of these two balls, as if he had enough control over time and space changes.

Therefore, he felt that it was not too difficult to fuse the time ball and the space ball.

"It should be that I have a mastery-level time ancestor and a mastery-level space ancestor, so I don't think it's difficult to fuse the time ball and the space ball, if I don't have these two talents, even if I want to fuse these two balls, I'm afraid it will be close to a boundary river year. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In terms of true talent, without copying talent, he would be a very ordinary cultivator, but with copying talent, he would be extremely demonic.

Especially this time, he copied the mastery-level time ancestor and the mastery-level space ancestor, so that his qualifications and talents suddenly soared to the top level of the boundary river.

To break through the sixth level, Ye Tian couldn't use such a long time as a boundary river year.

Time passed slowly, and it didn't take too long for Ye Tian to be sure of fusing the time ball and the space ball.

He's ready to start trying.

Anyway, there are three chances, and even if you fail this time, it's not a big deal.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian manipulated the time ball and the space ball respectively, using the power of time and the power of space to make the two balls start to approach, and using his own time power and space power to control the internal changes of the time ball and the space ball, so as to prevent the fusion of the time ball and the space ball from failing due to the changes in time and space.

Buzz Buzz !!!

The Sphere of Time and the Sphere of Space begin to merge, and both time and space begin to distort.

Under the control of Ye Tian's power, the time ball and the space ball did not conflict, and were fusing little by little.

In this process, time and space have undergone countless changes, and each change has been captured and reversed by Ye Tian, if there is no unimaginable perception and understanding of the integration and change of time and space, this step will not be possible at all.

Soon, the time sphere and the space sphere completely fused together and turned into a space-time sphere.

And doing this step means that Ye Tian has passed the sixth level.

"Congratulations on passing the sixth level and getting the entrance token of the Half-Tooth Secret Domain!"

Wow!

A token with the mark of the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda appeared out of thin air and fell into Ye Tian's hand.

With this token, he could directly enter the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

And I don't know how many peak Legendary Realm lords want to enter the Half Tooth Secret Domain, but in the end they can't do it.

He didn't know much about the half-tooth secret domain, so it was naturally a good thing to call the swastika into it.

After half-picking up this token, Ye Tian chose to continue to break into the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower.

So, he came to the seventh level.

At the same time, the information that Ye Tian had passed the sixth level was presented outside the Half Tooth Ancient Tower.

Suddenly, all the Peak Legendary Realm Lords and some of the half-step Eternal Masters who had come to see the excitement were shocked.

Before, Ye Tian had passed the fifth level, and they were already very surprised.

But now, Ye Tian took the lead in entering the sixth level, becoming the first batch of geniuses to break through the sixth level, and the speed of breaking through was too fast.

Many peak Legendary Realm lords understood the difficulty of the sixth level, and Ye Tian had passed the sixth level in such a short time, this talent qualification was terrifying.

At this time, many people were discussing Ye Tian.

"Who the hell is this Ye Tian?"

"I don't know, I haven't heard of it before. "

"He must be an ascetic, he hasn't been in the Boundary River much before, so he doesn't have a good reputation, maybe the son of the Eternal Master appeared in the Boundary River for the first time. "

"That's right, many eternal masters will give birth to heirs in their hometown Eternal Realm, and their heirs will also be cultivated in the Eternal Realm, once they enter the Boundary River, they will rise quickly, and even hope to become Eternal Masters in the future, and the Boundary River Life wants to become an eternal master, which is almost an extravagant hope, and I don't know how many times more difficult. "

"I really envy those eternal realm lives!"

"Envy, I really let you be born in the Eternal Realm, if you don't have a background, even becoming a peak Legendary Realm Lord is an extravagant hope!"

......

While these peak Legendary Realm lords were discussing Ye Tian, Ye Tian had already come to the seventh level.

The seventh level assesses the ability to create, and it is to create the specified secret technique according to the requirements of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower.

Ye Tian originally thought that he was asking for something to create a similar secret technique, but the truth was a little different from what he imagined.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian appeared in a void, and a figure suddenly appeared.

The aura of this figure doesn't seem to be very powerful, and it is also the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm of the third level, such a peak Legendary Realm lord, he can easily defeat it!

The point is, this level is said to be a test of the secret art of creation, why is there an opponent?

He hadn't asked for the details of the seventh level before, but had just heard a few words from the other Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

However, you will know what the situation is with a single attack.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian cast the Void Touch, turning into a purple hand, which instantly penetrated this figure.

The Void Touch penetrated the other party's body, but something shocked Ye Tian happened.

The other party is not injured, it is really no injury, there is no injury at all, but his attack is useless.

"Imprisoned in time and space, imprisoned for me!"

"Thousand True Bodies!"

"Sword slash three bodies, slash!"

Ye Tian kept attacking this figure, but no matter how he attacked, he couldn't kill the other party.

Just when Ye Tian thought that the other party did not exist in this time and space, but was just a phantom, the other party attacked.

Boom!

Ye Tian was hit, although he was not injured, but the other party was indeed an entity.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian couldn't win against the other party, and the other party couldn't hurt himself.

If it's an evenly matched opponent, it's fine, but the other party is a weak chicken, and he can't hurt the other party, which is very speechless. (Li Qianhao)

However, Ye Tian quickly saw through the clues.

This must have been a rule set by the Half-Tooth Master, allowing the figure to ignore his attacks.

Moreover, every peak Legendary Realm Lord has broken through to the seventh level, and the opponents they encounter should be different, and if they want to defeat the opponents of the seventh level, there is only one way - to create a secret technique to restrain the opponent!

That's the only way to pass the seventh level.

"Create ability, create designated secret arts, this is the way to break through. Once I've created the secret technique required for the seventh level, I'm afraid I can smash the opponent's body with a single blow and complete this level. "

"However, it is difficult to get through this hurdle!"

"Moreover, there is a time limit for this level, and there is only one tenth of a year. "

Ye Tian felt the difficulty of this level at this moment, it was simply unexpected, I am afraid that there are not many geniuses in the boundary river who can break through the seventh level.

However, no matter how difficult it was, he had to try. _
